calendar.matters:
Petitioner'S Request To Release Property From Claim Of Lien And Related Relief
Off Calendar Sep-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM CLAIM OF LIEN AND RELATED RELIEF is GRANTED. Reasonable and necessary attorney's fees granted in the amount of $1,200 (4 hours at $300/hour; the Court notes that hourly rate and billing information was not provided, just a lump sum) and costs in the amount of $495 (first appearance fee and motion fee). Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Release Of Property From Lien [Cal. Civil Code 8490] And For Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Sep-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN AND FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS is OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion And Notice Of Motion To Set Hearing And For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONR'S MOTION TO SET HEARING AND FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
